series_metadata.series_description: Accomplishment reports of urban foresters, service foresters, and utilization and marketing foresters for the federal government. These records are kept on an electronic database and information is sent to the Forest Service annually in October.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain monthly reports for 1 year after close of fiscal year involved and then destroy. Retain accomplishment reports for 5 years after close of calendar year involved and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
